name: Salmon Tacos
recipeIngredient: 418 g Canned Alaska salmon (pink or red)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 200°C (400°F) or Gas mark 6.
2. Drain the canned salmon and flake the fish into small pieces. Set aside.
3. In a bowl, mix together the fromage frais (or Greek yogurt), cucumber, and mint. Set aside.
4. Heat the taco shells in the oven for 2-3 minutes until they are pliable. Alternatively, warm them in a microwave for about 30 seconds per shell on HIGH.
5. Assemble each taco by adding lettuce and tomato pieces to the shell, then top with salmon chunks, a spoonful of cucumber mixture, and grated cheese. Garnish as desired.
6. Serve immediately. Serves 6-8. Approx. 310 kcal per serving.
From: On the Wild Side - Alaska Canned Salmon Recipes
